title: Join a Circle
subtitle: Enter the unique code shared by the organizer to request access.
enterCodeMessage: Type the code you received from the organizer.
notFoundMessage: Check the code and try again.
genericError: The request could not be completed. Please try again.
previewInfo: If the organizer already added your phone or email, you may claim your hand right away. Otherwise your request waits for organizer approval.

outcome.claimedMessage: Your hand in {{circleName}} is ready. You can open the circle workspace when you're ready.
outcome.pendingMessage: Your request to join {{circleName}} is waiting for the organizer to approve. You'll be notified once they review it.
outcome.unknownMessage: Your request for {{circleName}} was submitted. Check your circles for the latest status.

signInRequired: You need to be signed in to join a circle.
